title: Preorder the Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 Now and Get a $50 Amazon Gift Card
summary: Samsung just announced a ton of new products at its July Unpacked event , and among them is the highly anticipated Galaxy Watch 9. That is an increase from the Galaxy Watch 8’s 325mAh and 435mAh batteries, respectively.
